outline.title: [Unity Collective]
outline.summary: Title slide introducing the platform and its mission to empower the Black community through economic strength.

outline.title: The Opportunity is Now
outline.summary: Highlights the $1.8 trillion Black consumer market and the need for a unified digital platform to increase economic recirculation.

outline.title: Five Pillars of Empowerment
outline.summary: Introduces the five core pillars of the platform: Community Hub, Business Directory, Marketplace, Education, and Media Center.

outline.title: The Business Directory
outline.summary: Details the Business Directory feature, showcasing verified profiles, category filtering, and integrated vendor storefronts.
outline.image_plan: /home/ubuntu/upload/pasted_file_fEX3Ve_image.png - The image shows a list of features, including 'Business Directory', with a 'PASS' status, which directly relates to the slide's content about the Business Directory.

outline.title: The Marketplace
outline.summary: Explains the Marketplace e-commerce experience, including real-time cart calculations, free shipping thresholds, and authentication-required checkout.

outline.title: Secure, Community-First Authentication
outline.summary: Discusses the importance of authentication in building trust, detailing the role-based access and contextual navigation features.

outline.title: Messages and Offers
outline.summary: Describes the Community Offers and Barter system, highlighting direct messaging and the ability to exchange skills and services.

outline.title: Stripe-Ready Payment Architecture
outline.summary: Outlines the scalable payment infrastructure, explaining the Strategy Pattern that allows seamless switching between mock and live Stripe payments.

outline.title: Feature-Complete and Production-Ready
outline.summary: Summarizes the current status of the platform, confirming that all core features are complete and tested on a clean TypeScript codebase.

outline.title: Three Clear Steps to Launch
outline.summary: Presents the roadmap to launch, focusing on branding, infrastructure activation, and community onboarding.

outline.title: Join Us
outline.summary: A call to action for businesses, community members, investors, and developers to join and support the movement.

outline.title: Thank You
outline.summary: Closing slide with a final statement on community investment and contact information.
